requirements_met.evidence: README.md section 'Status-Bar Integration' documents active CLI instance, agent._tps_snapshot, patch points, snapshot fields, time.monotonic() age calculation, positive/zero display behavior, and privacy-treated session comparison.

requirements_met.requirement: README summarizes current observability surfaces without claiming absent endpoints exist
requirements_met.evidence: README.md sections 'In-Process API Helper' and 'Observability Contract' document agent._tps_snapshot, get_tps_stats(session_id), get_observability_contract(), get_privacy_diagnostics(), and mark REST/WebSocket/Prometheus unavailable when contract available=false.

README.md section 'Troubleshooting' includes symptom/cause/check rows for no display, zero stats, stale display, cross-session mismatch, privacy-redacted identifiers, missing optional surfaces, plugin registration failures, and blank labels.

README field names, hook name, plugin name/version, helper names, unavailable optional surfaces, and privacy env vars were cross-checked against plugin.yaml, __init__.py, tests/test_api.py, and tests/test_privacy.py.
Only README.md is staged for implementation; solve-ledger/progress/evidence artifacts document the bead. Pre-existing unstaged .gitignore and unrelated untracked scheduler files were not staged.
